exercises.question: Choose the word that has the underlined part pronounced differently: house, happen, hair, honor
exercises.explanation: Từ nào có phần gạch chân phát âm khác? | honor — /h/ không phát âm (silent h) | A: house — /h/ phát âm | B: happen — /h/ phát âm | C: hair — /h/ phát âm | D: honor — /h/ không phát âm

exercises.question: Choose the word that has the underlined part pronounced differently: finishes, provides, approaches, crashes
exercises.explanation: Từ nào có phần gạch chân phát âm khác? | provides — kết thúc /z/ | A: finishes — /ɪz/ | B: provides — /z/ | C: approaches — /ɪz/ | D: crashes — /ɪz/

exercises.question: Choose the word that its main stress is placed differently: replace, control, escape, mention
exercises.explanation: Từ nào có trọng âm khác vị trí? | mention — trọng âm ở âm tiết thứ nhất | A: replace — trọng âm âm tiết 2 | B: control — trọng âm âm tiết 2 | C: escape — trọng âm âm tiết 2 | D: mention — trọng âm âm tiết 1

exercises.question: Choose the word that its main stress is placed differently: enormous, dangerous, successful, expensive
exercises.explanation: Từ nào có trọng âm khác vị trí? | dangerous — trọng âm ở âm tiết thứ nhất | A: enormous — trọng âm âm tiết 2 | B: dangerous — trọng âm âm tiết 1 | C: successful — trọng âm âm tiết 2 | D: expensive — trọng âm âm tiết 2

exercises.question: Companies now realize that _______ want products that will not only work effectively but also save money.
exercises.explanation: Cần một danh từ làm chủ ngữ. | consumers — người tiêu dùng (những người mua sản phẩm) | A: consumed — động từ quá khứ | B: consumes — động từ ngôi 3 | C: consumers — danh từ | D: consumption — danh từ trừu tượng

exercises.question: The ones about _______ I have been worried these days are the students of mine.
exercises.explanation: Giới từ + whom cho người trong mệnh đề quan hệ. | whom — about whom | A: that — dùng cho vật | B: whom — đúng (người) | C: whose — sở hữu | D: which — dùng cho vật

exercises.question: They never came to class late, and _______.
exercises.explanation: neither + động từ đảo ngược = tôi cũng không. | neither did I — đảo ngược | A: neither I did — sai trật tự | B: neither did I — đúng | C: I did either — sai | D: so did I — sai nghĩa

exercises.question: I hope _______ to know this beautiful city better.
exercises.explanation: "hope to get to know" = mong được làm quen với. | to get — cấu trúc hope to + V | A: to get — đúng | B: to need — sai nghĩa | C: to appear — sai nghĩa | D: to have — sai nghĩa

exercises.question: Jeff completely ignored what I said and _______ on eating.
exercises.explanation: "went on eating" = tiếp tục ăn. | went — đúng cụm từ | A: went — đúng | B: put — sai nghĩa | C: tried — sai nghĩa | D: depended — sai nghĩa

exercises.question: Mr. Trung, who teaches Maths here, speaks very _______ English.
exercises.explanation: good là tính từ, dùng sửa danh từ English. | good — tính từ sửa danh từ | A: well — trạng từ | B: best — so sánh hơn nhất | C: good — đúng | D: fluently — trạng từ

exercises.question: Watching TV all day is a bad habit _______ we get no exercise and eat unhealthy snacks.
exercises.explanation: because giới thiệu lý do tại sao là thói xấu. | because — giới thiệu lý do | A: therefore — kết quả | B: because — đúng | C: but — đối lập | D: though — mặc dù

exercises.question: Are you _______ teaching on Saturday mornings this term?
exercises.explanation: busy + V-ing = đang bận làm gì đó. | busy — đúng với V-ing | A: enjoy — thiếu +ing | B: likely — sai cấu trúc | C: busy — đúng | D: expected — sai cấu trúc

exercises.question: I suggest that we should _______ people from catching fish by using electricity.
exercises.explanation: prohibit someone from + V-ing = cấm ai làm gì. | prohibit — đúng cấu trúc | A: let — sai nghĩa | B: prohibit — đúng | C: encourage — khuyến khích | D: relate — liên quan

exercises.question: I asked her whether was there a fridge in the kitchen. (Find the underlined part that needs correction)
exercises.explanation: Câu có lỗi: was there → whether there was — Lỗi trật tự câu | Câu hỏi gián tiếp cần trật tự câu trần thuật, không đảo ngược. Quy tắc: không đảo ngược, không dùng do/does/did. 'Was there...?' phải thành 'whether there was...'. Cũng cần lùi thì: 'is' → 'was'.

exercises.question: People have used leather to make shoes since hundreds of years. (Find the underlined part that needs correction)
exercises.explanation: Câu có lỗi: since → for — Lỗi giới từ thời gian | Quy tắc: 'for' + thời lượng (for hundreds of years), 'since' + điểm bắt đầu (since 2001). 'Hundreds of years' là thời lượng nên cần 'for'. Đây là lỗi phổ biến nhất trong kỳ thi.

exercises.question: My father's motorbike is using too many gas now. (Find the underlined part that needs correction)
exercises.explanation: Câu có lỗi: too many → too much — Lỗi đếm được/không đếm được | gas là danh từ không đếm được, nên dùng 'too much' (không phải 'too many').

exercises.question: Vuong Khoa: "_______" Truong Thanh: "Why not?"
options: A. How about cooking the meal now?
B. Have you cooked the meal?
C. You should cook the meal now
D. We'd better be cooking the meal.
exercises.explanation: "Why not?" là phản hồi đồng ý đề xuất. 'How about...?' là cách đề xuất. | A: How about cooking — đúng (đề xuất) | B: Have you cooked — câu hỏi | C: You should cook — mệnh lệnh | D: We'd better be — sai thì

exercises.question: Sue: "Thank you very much for your donation." Peter: "_______"
exercises.explanation: "It's my pleasure" là phản hồi lịch sự khi được cảm ơn. | D: It's my pleasure — đúng | A: Yes, do it now — không phù hợp | B: Not a chance — không lịch sự | C: Sure, I'll do it — không phù hợp

exercises.question: In Vietnam, there are few public transport options, so many people rely on motorbikes to get around.
exercises.explanation: public (cho mọi người) nghĩa đối lập với private (cho cá nhân). | A: private — đúng | B: popular — phổ biến | C: open — mở | D: secret — bí mật

exercises.question: She failed to get into medical university.
exercises.explanation: failed nghĩa đối lập với passed trong bối cảnh thi cử/tuyển sinh. | B: passed — đúng | A: didn't succeed — đồng nghĩa | B: passed — đối lập | C: qualified — đủ điều kiện | D: satisfied — hài lòng

exercises.question: I am pleased that you passed your exams with good results.
exercises.explanation: pleased = happy = delighted. | B: delighted — đúng | A: unhappy — đối lập | B: delighted — đồng nghĩa | C: dissatisfied — đối lập | D: bored — chán

exercises.question: Well, shopping isn't my cup of tea either. I'd rather stay at home and read a book.
options: A. I do not enjoy shopping at all
B. I must have regular meals while shopping
C. I don't usually drink tea while shopping
exercises.explanation: "not my cup of tea" = thành ngữ không thích làm gì. | A: I do not enjoy shopping at all — đúng | B: I must have regular meals — sai nghĩa | C: I don't usually drink tea — sai nghĩa | D: I enjoy shopping tremendously — đối lập

exercises.passage: Japan, (23) _______ on the Ring of Fire on the edge of the Pacific Ocean, has suffered some major earthquakes over the years. However, nothing before compared to the triple disaster of March 11, 2011: a massive earthquake followed by powerful tsunamis (24) _______ led to a serious nuclear accident. The horrors began shortly before three (25) _______ the afternoon local time with a 9.0-magnitude earthquake. Its epicenter was nearly 20 miles (26) _______ the floor of the Pacific Ocean, about 80 miles east of the Japanese city of Sendai. The quake was one of the most powerful ever recorded and the (27) _______ to hit this region of Japan.

questions.question: Fill blank (23)
questions.explanation: "situated on" = located on. Danh từ quá khứ phân như mệnh đề quan hệ rút gọn. | C: situated — đúng | A: was — sai | B: lied — sai | C: situated — đúng | D: placed — sai

questions.question: Fill blank (24)
questions.explanation: which tham chiếu đến 'tsunamis' (vật) làm chủ ngữ mệnh đề quan hệ. | B: which — đúng | A: who — cho người | B: which — cho vật | C: whom — cho người | D: when — thời gian

questions.question: Fill blank (25)
questions.explanation: in the afternoon là giới từ đúng cho thời điểm trong ngày. | A: in — đúng | A: in — đúng | B: at — dùng giờ cụ thể | C: over — hơn | D: On — viết hoa sai

questions.question: Fill blank (26)
questions.explanation: below the floor = bên dưới đáy đại dương. | A: below — đúng | A: below — bên dưới | B: on — bên trên | C: upper — trên | D: lower — dưới

questions.question: Fill blank (27)
questions.explanation: the strongest to hit this region — so sánh nhất với 'the'. | C: strongest — đúng | A: strong — so sánh hơn | B: stronger — so sánh hơn | C: strongest — so sánh nhất | D: strength — danh từ

exercises.passage: Many people now think that teachers give pupils too much homework. They say that it is unnecessary for children to work at home in their free time. Moreover, they argue that most teachers do not properly plan the homework tasks they give to pupils. The result is that pupils have to repeat tasks, which they have already done at school. Recently many parents complained about the difficult homework which teachers gave to their children. The Greek parents said that most of the homework was a waste of time, and they wanted to stop it. Spain and Turkey are two countries, which stopped homework recently. In Denmark, West Germany and several other countries in Europe, teachers cannot set homework at weekends. In Holland, teachers allow pupils to stay at school to do their homework. The children are free to help one another. Similar arrangements also exist in some British schools.

questions.question: According to many parents, _______.
options: A. a lot of homework has not been planned properly
B. teachers do not set enough homework.
C. children are too lazy to do
D. children shouldn't be given marks for homework
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói: 'hầu hết giáo viên không lên kế hoạch đúng cách cho bài tập về nhà'. | A: a lot of homework has not been planned properly — đúng | B: teachers do not set enough homework — không đề cập | C: children are too lazy to do — không đề cập | D: children shouldn't be given marks for homework — không đề cập

questions.question: According to the writer, many parents would like their children to _______.
options: A. do homework both at school and at home
C. do homework at school only
questions.explanation: Phụ huynh muốn dừng bài tập về nhà; Hà Lan cho phép học sinh làm bài tập ở trường. | C: do homework at school only — đúng | A: do homework both at school and at home — không đề cập | B: have test homework — không đề cập | C: do homework at school only — đúng | D: do more difficult homework — không đề cập

questions.question: Homework is unfair because _______.
options: B. Some pupils have to help their parents with housework and some others do not
C. Some parents help their children with their homework while some others do not
D. Some pupils do their homework in a quiet and comfortable room while some others do homework in a small, noisy room
questions.explanation: Cả C và D đều được đề cập trong đoạn văn là lý do bài tập về nhà không công bằng. | A: C&D — đúng | A: C&D — đúng | B: Some pupils have to help their parents — đề cập | C: Some parents help their children — đề cập | D: Some pupils do their homework in a quiet room — đề cập

questions.question: Pick out the statement that is not true.
options: A. Only a small number of people think homework is fair.
B. Teachers should advise the parents about how to work together with their children at home.
C. All parents show great interest in their children's homework.
D. Children can do their homework at school and help each other in some schools in Britain.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói: 'Những phụ huynh khác không quan tâm chút nào đến bài tập về nhà của con'. Vậy C sai. | C: All parents show great interest — sai | A: Only a small number of people think homework is fair — đúng | B: Teachers should advise the parents — đề cập | C: All parents show great interest — sai | D: Children can do their homework at school — đúng

questions.question: Greek parents thought _______.
options: A. their children's homework was useless
B. their children's homework was too easy
C. their children's homework was useful
D. more time should be allowed for homework
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói phụ huynh Hy Lạp cho là hầu hết bài tập là phí thời gian. | A: their children's homework was useless — đúng | A: useless — phí thời gian | B: too easy — không đề cập | C: useful — đối lập | D: more time should be allowed — không đề cập

exercises.question: "I will call the police if you don't give me back my bicycle". (Choose the sentence with the same meaning)
options: A. Unless you give me back my bicycle, I won't call the police.
B. Unless you give me back my bicycle, I will call the police.
C. Unless you don't give me back my bicycle, I will call the police.
D. Unless you gave me back my bicycle, I would call the police.
exercises.explanation: "If you don't..." = "Unless you...". Lời đe dọa giữ nguyên: I will call the police. | B: Unless you give me back my bicycle, I will call the police — đúng | A: I won't call — đối nghĩa | B: I will call — đúng | C: Unless you don't — sai cấu trúc | D: I would call — sai thì

exercises.question: No one has asked me that question before. (Choose the sentence with the same meaning)
options: A. I have ever been asked that question before.
B. That question has ever been asked by no one before.
C. That question has never been asked me before by anyone.
D. I have never been asked that question before.
exercises.explanation: Bị động: 'I have never been asked that question before' giữ nguyên nghĩa. | D: I have never been asked that question before — đúng | A: I have ever been asked — sai nghĩa | B: That question has ever been asked — sai nghĩa | C: That question has never been asked me — sai cấu trúc

exercises.question: Nam forgot to take his raincoat, so he got wet. (Choose the sentence with the same meaning)
options: A. Nam got wet, so he forgot to take his raincoat.
B. Nam got wet; however, he forgot to take his raincoat.
C. Nam got wet because he forgot to take his raincoat.
D. Nam got wet although he forgot to take his raincoat.
exercises.explanation: because chỉ nguyên nhân: quên áo mưa gây ra bị ướt. | C: Nam got wet because he forgot to take his raincoat — đúng | A: so he forgot — đảo trật tự sai | B: however — đối lập sai | C: because — đúng | D: although — đối lập sai

exercises.question: Janet said to me, "Have you ever seen a UFO?" (Choose the sentence with the same meaning)
options: A. Janet told me if I had ever seen a UFO.
B. Janet wanted to know whether I have ever seen a UFO.
C. Janet asked me if I had ever seen a UFO.
D. Janet asked me have I ever seen a UFO.
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi gián tiếp (Quy tắc): 'asked + if/whether + trật tự câu trần thuật + lùi thì'. 'Have you ever seen?' → 'if I had ever seen' (have → had). Quy tắc quan trọng: (1) không dấu chấm hỏi, (2) không đảo ngược, (3) không dùng trợ động từ do/does/did. Đáp án A sai vì 'told' ngụ ý câu trần thuật, không phải câu hỏi. Đáp án B sai: không lùi thì ('have' không đổi thành 'had').

exercises.question: It/be/necessary/have a day/celebrate/our parents (Choose the best sentence from cues)
options: A. It is necessary to have a day for celebrate for our parents.
B. It is necessity to have a day to celebrate for our parents.
C. It is necessary to have a day to celebrate for our parents.
D. It is necessary to have a day to celebrate to our parents.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc đúng: 'It is necessary to have a day to celebrate for our parents'. | C: It is necessary to have a day to celebrate for our parents — đúng | A: celebrate for — thiếu to | B: necessity — danh từ sai | C: to celebrate for — đúng | D: celebrate to — sai giới từ

exercises.question: Although/he/tired/he/have to/finish/homework/. (Choose the best sentence from cues)
options: A. Although he tired, he has to finish the homework.
B. Although he is tired, he has to finish his homework.
C. Although he tired, he have to finish the homework.
D. Although he was tired, he has to finish his homework.
exercises.explanation: 'Although he is tired' cần 'is' (be + tính từ). Tính nhất quán thì hiện tại. | B: Although he is tired, he has to finish his homework — đúng | A: Although he tired — thiếu is | B: Although he is tired — đúng | C: he have to — sai | D: he was tired — lùi thì không cần

exercises.question: Children/should have/special day/express/feeling/memories/love/their parents. (Choose the best sentence from cues)
options: A. Children should have a special day expressing their feeling, memories and love for their parents.
B. Children should have a special day to express their feeling, memories and love for their parents.
C. Children should have a special day express their feeling, memories and love for their parents.
D. Children should have a special day expressing their feeling, memories and love to their parents.
exercises.explanation: 'a special day to express' (to V-ing mục đích) là cấu trúc đúng. | B: Children should have a special day to express their feeling, memories and love for their parents — đúng | A: expressing — không phải mục đích | B: to express — đúng | C: express — thiếu to | D: expressing to — sai giới từ

exercises.question: The novels/I/just/read/interesting. (Choose the best sentence from cues)
options: A. The novels whom I have just read are interesting
B. The novels who I have just read are interesting.
C. The novels which I had just read is interesting
D. The novels which I have just read are interesting.
exercises.explanation: which cho vật, present perfect have just read, số nhiều are. | D: The novels which I have just read are interesting — đúng | A: whom — chỉ người | B: who — chỉ người | C: which I had just read is — sai thì, sai động từ

exercises.original: "I will call the police if you don't give me back my bicycle."
exercises.answer: Unless you give me back my bicycle, I will call the police.
acceptedAnswers: Unless you give me back my bicycle, I will call the police.
Unless you give me back my bicycle, I will call the police
Unless you give back my bicycle, I will call the police.
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: Nếu anh không trả xe đạp cho tôi, tôi sẽ gọi cảnh sát. | Yêu cầu: Đổi 'if you don't' thành 'Unless'. | Đáp án — Cấu trúc: Unless you give me back my bicycle, I will call the police. | Giải thích: Đổi 'if you don't' thành 'Unless'. 'if you don't give me back' → 'Unless you give me back', giữ nguyên thì hiện tại đơn + will.

exercises.original: No one has asked me that question before.
exercises.answer: That question has never been asked before.
acceptedAnswers: That question has never been asked before.
That question has never been asked before
That question has never been asked me before by anyone.
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: Chưa ai hỏi tôi câu đó trước đây. | Yêu cầu: Đổi chủ ngữ sang bắt đầu bằng 'That question'. | Đáp án — Cấu trúc: That question has never been asked before. | Giải thích: Chuyển chủ động sang bị động. 'No one has asked' → 'has never been asked', đưa 'That question' lên làm chủ ngữ.

exercises.original: Nam forgot to take his raincoat, so he got wet.
exercises.instruction: Rewrite beginning with: Nam got wet
exercises.answer: Nam got wet because he forgot to take his raincoat.
acceptedAnswers: Nam got wet because he forgot to take his raincoat.
Nam got wet because he forgot to take his raincoat
Nam got wet as he forgot to take his raincoat.
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: Nam quên mang áo mưa nên bị ướt. | Yêu cầu: Bắt đầu bằng 'Nam got wet'. | Đáp án — Cấu trúc: Nam got wet because he forgot to take his raincoat. | Giải thích: Đổi 'so' (kết quả) thành 'because' (nguyên nhân), đảo thứ tự mệnh đề. 'forgot..., so he got wet' → 'got wet because he forgot...'

exercises.original: Janet said to me, "Have you ever seen a UFO?"
exercises.answer: Janet asked me if I had ever seen a UFO.
acceptedAnswers: Janet asked me if I had ever seen a UFO.
Janet asked me if I had ever seen a UFO
Janet asked me whether I had ever seen a UFO.
exercises.explanation: Câu gốc: Janet hỏi tôi 'Bạn đã từng nhìn thấy UFO không?' | Yêu cầu: Chuyển thành câu gián tiếp, bắt đầu bằng 'Janet asked'. | Đáp án — Cấu trúc: Janet asked me if I had ever seen a UFO. | Giải thích: Chuyển câu hỏi trực tiếp sang gián tiếp. 'Have you ever seen?' → 'if I had ever seen', lùi thì have → had, đổi you → I.

exercises.prompt: It / be / necessary / have a day / celebrate / our parents
exercises.answer: It is necessary to have a day to celebrate our parents.
acceptedAnswers: It is necessary to have a day to celebrate our parents.
It is necessary to have a day to celebrate our parents
It is necessary to have a day to celebrate for our parents.
exercises.explanation: Yêu cầu: Viết câu hoàn chỉnh từ gợi ý. | Đáp án — Cụm từ dùng: It is necessary to have a day to celebrate our parents. | Giải thích: Cấu trúc It is + adjective + to + infinitive.

exercises.prompt: Although / he / tired / he / have to / finish / homework
exercises.answer: Although he is tired, he has to finish his homework.
acceptedAnswers: Although he is tired, he has to finish his homework.
Although he is tired, he has to finish his homework
Although he was tired, he had to finish his homework.
exercises.explanation: Yêu cầu: Viết câu hoàn chỉnh từ gợi ý. | Đáp án — Cụm từ dùng: Although he is tired, he has to finish his homework. | Giải thích: Although + clause, + main clause for concession.

exercises.prompt: Children / should have / special day / express / feeling / memories / love / their parents
exercises.answer: Children should have a special day to express their feeling, memories and love for their parents.
acceptedAnswers: Children should have a special day to express their feeling, memories and love for their parents.
Children should have a special day to express their feelings, memories and love for their parents.
Children should have a special day expressing their feeling, memories and love for their parents.
exercises.explanation: Yêu cầu: Viết câu hoàn chỉnh từ gợi ý. | Đáp án — Cụm từ dùng: Children should have a special day to express their feeling, memories and love for their parents. | Giải thích: Should + have + noun + to-infinitive for purpose.

exercises.prompt: The novels / I / just / read / interesting
exercises.answer: The novels which I have just read are interesting.
acceptedAnswers: The novels which I have just read are interesting.
The novels which I have just read are interesting
The novels that I have just read are interesting.
The novels I have just read are interesting.
exercises.explanation: Yêu cầu: Viết câu hoàn chỉnh từ gợi ý. | Đáp án — Cụm từ dùng: The novels which I have just read are interesting. | Giải thích: Dùng mệnh đề quan hệ (which/that) để nối hai ý.
